Object.Field:
Purpose:
Usage: Specific to Project or generals

Purpose:
Usage: Specific to Project or generals
SELECT case when instr(:SSDS.SSDS_BATCH_DT,'-')=0 then TO_CHAR(to_DATE(:SSDS.SSDS_BATCH_DT,'YYYYMMDD'),'DD-MON-YYYY') else :SSDS.SSDS_BATCH_DT end FROM DUAL

<map-generation-info> <node name="IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_STG" type="IKM" km="IKM Oracle Insert.GLOBAL"> <option name="CREATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="INSERT_HINT" value="APPEND PARALLEL" default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="CONSTRAINTS" value="None" default="true"/> <option name="TRUNCATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="DELETE_ALL" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="INDEXES" value="None" default="true"/> <option name="DROP_AND_CREATE_TARGET_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> </node> <node name="IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_STG" type="CKM" km="CKM Oracle.SSDS"> <option name="DROP_ERROR_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="DROP_CHECK_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="CREATE_ERROR_INDEX" value="true" default="true"/> <option name="CREATE_FLOW_INDEX" value="true" default="true"/> <option name="COMPATIBLE" value="9" default="true"/> <option name="VALIDATE" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="ENABLE_EDITION_SUPPORT" value="false" default="true"/> <option name="UPGRADE_ERROR_TABLE" value="false" default="true"/> </node> <node name="IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL" type="XKM" km="XKM Oracle Extract.GLOBAL"> <option name="CUSTOM_TEMPLATE" value=" " default="true"/> <option name="SELECT_HINT" value=" " default="true"/> </node> <target name="IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_STG" resource="IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_STG" model="SSDS_TRANSACTIONS_OWNER" logicalSchema="SSDS_TRANSACTIONS_OWNER" forcedContext=""/> </map-generation-info>

INSERT /*+ APPEND PARALLEL */ INTO <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_STG", "SSDS_TRANSACTIONS_OWNER", "D") ?> ( IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_ID , RCV_DLV_TP_CD , ACR_INT_AMT , ARB_NUM , CST_AC_NUM , TXN_PRC_AMT , GRP_CST_AC_NUM , GRP_CST_NM , SCR_CPN_STRK_PRC_AMT , SCR_PRIM_CMDTY_CD , MAT_DT , MKT_CD , POOL_NUM , IMT_TP_CD , PNP_AMT , SD , RET_DT , TRDR_ID , TXN_DT , TXN_AMT , TXN_NUM , SCR_PRC , CNCL_REVISE_CD , FNC_RATE , IMP_FA_NUM , CST_IMP_FA_NUM , OTSND_AVY_SORT_CD , CLRD_AMT , EFF_STRT_OF_DAY_FAIL_AMT , FAIL_ADJ_AMT , TXN_RSN_CD , JRNL_INSR_OVRD_F , TXN_CMSN_AMT , DEPST_AC_NUM , CST_AC_NM , SCR_NM , OTSND_DT , FNC_INT_TO_DT_AMT , OPN_F , USD_MRGN_AMT , MRGN_PCT , ACR_INT_TO_DT_AMT , TRD_PNP_W_ACR_INT_AMT , CLTRL_VAL , MKT_VAL , FNC_EXS_DEFICIT_F , FRGN_CST_CTRY_CD , BD_SORT_TP_CD , PNP_PAYDOWN_F , RCV_DLV_DRC_CD , RET_DT_SORT_F , BKR_AC_NUM , EXP_DT , CTR_FACE_VAL , CRN_POOL_FCTR_RATE , MRGN_PNP_AMT , MTD_FNC_INT_AMT , FNC_INT_DRC_CD , FNC_TOTALS_TP_CD , FILE_CD , FNC_GRP_TP_CD , TODAY_MARK_TO_MKT_VAL , ACG_TP_CD , SCR_CCY_CD , SETL_CCY_CD , SPOT_EXG_RATE , FNC_ACR_CD , PHYS_WIREABLE_F , ITNL_DMST_CD , BRW_LOAN_FEE_FRQ_CD , FAIL_PNP_AMT , FAIL_INT_AMT , CRN_FAIL_USD_AMT , CLRD_FAIL_USD_AMT , STRT_OF_DAY_FAIL_USD_AMT , FAIL_ADJ_USD_AMT , SBC_EXG_RATE , EX_DVDN_F , CUSIP_NUM , ISIN , FIRM_TRD_CPCTY_CD , CST_TRD_CPCTY_CD , CLTRL_VAL_W_HRCT_AMT , MRGN_W_HRCT_USD_AMT , MRGN_PCT_W_HRCT_RATE , CALC_HRCT_F , HRCT_RATE , ASOF_TD , SFAS_125_RPT_INCLUSION_F , SRC_CRT_TM , AVY_LINK_NUM , FNC_BKR_CHRG_AMT , TXN_FEE_AMT , RATE_EFF_DT , FIRM_CMSN_AMT , PNDG_ACR_INT_TO_DT_AMT , FIRM_MNY_DEPST_AC , PYMT_MODE_CD , DEALER_BKR_OTHR_CD , FNC_TP_CD , NORMALIZED_TXN_AMT , EXT_TRD_SRC_CD , PNP_TRDR_NM , ENT_COST_CNTR_CD , SBO_TP_CD , NORMALIZED_TD_OTSND_AMT , NORMALIZED_ALCT_TBA_AMT , NORMALIZED_PAIROFF_TBA_AMT , USR_PRFL_NM , PAIR_OFF_CNTL_AMT , RPRCH_CTR_W_HRCT_VAL , RPRCH_DDCN_AMT , HRCT_EXS_AMT , HRCT_DEFICIT_AMT , HRCT_VAL , CLS_ASK_PRC , BID_PRC , TXN_FEE_2_AMT , DLV_DT , CTRY_CD , PCS_F , SEDOL_NUM , NORMALIZED_LINKED_TRD_TOT_AMT , DIRTY_PRC , ORIG_TENOR_FNC_TP_CD , TAX_WHLD_AMT , TAX_TP_CD , TAX_RATE , DFLT_FATCA_WHLD_PCT , FATCA_TAX_WHLD_AMT , NON_RSDNT_ALIEN_TAX_WHLD_AMT , DROP_THR_BOND_RATE , NON_RSDNT_ALIEN_TAX_DROP_THR_WHLD_AMT , FATCA_TAX_CR_AMT , MBS_POOL_TXN_TP_CD , CST_TBA_MRGN_CD , EXT_VRSN_NUM , PREV_TXN_ID , THEORETICAL_LOAN_VAL , REPO_MARK_TO_MKT_VAL , REPO_MARK_TO_MKT_PRC , CRT_DTM , CRT_USR_NM , LAST_UDT_DTM , LAST_UDT_USR_NM , CALC_PAR_TXN_PRC_AMT ) SELECT IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL.IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_ID , IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL.RCV_DLV_TP_CD , IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL.ACR_INT_AMT , IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL.ARB_NUM , IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL.CST_AC_NUM , FROM <?= odiRef.getObjectName("L", "IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL", "SSDS_FILL_OWNER", "D") ?> IMP_OTSND_AVY_FACT_FILL

Update <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.SSDS_SESS_LOG set SESS_END= SYSDATE, LAST_UDT_DTM=SYSDATE, LAST_UDT_USR_NM='<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>', job_status='COMPLETED' where SESS_NO=:GLOBAL.GV_ODI_SESS_NO

Update <?=odiRef.getSchemaName("SSDS_UTIL_OWNER", "D") ?>.SSDS_SESS_LOG set SESS_END= SYSDATE, LAST_UDT_DTM=SYSDATE, LAST_UDT_USR_NM='<?=odiRef.getSession("SESS_NAME") ?>', job_status='FAILED' where SESS_NO=:GLOBAL.GV_ODI_SESS_NO
